title: Bleach Weapons
description: This is a 1.15.2 mod that adds weapons from the Manga/Anime of Bleach!
body:
<center>

![](https://i.imgur.com/qv8j8aw.png)

This mod aims to bring in the weapons from the manga/anime series of Bleach! Right now it's just adding the weapons with no current plans to do the attacks. 

## Weapons:

![](https://i.imgur.com/ujobsF4.png)

Adds Zangetsu, Hollow Zangetsu, Bankai Zangetsu, Hollow Bankai Zangetsu, Asauchi, and Hollow Asauchi

## How to Find Them:

You can now find all the weapons randomly in loot chests found in mines, strongholds, desert pyramids, jungle temples, underwater ruins and village blacksmiths. If you have Mine and Slash installed, they are added to the drops of mobs that you kill!  

## Model Credits:

https://www.models-resource.com/psp/bleachheatthesoul7/

</center>
